name: Potato Cinnamon Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix potatoes and milk until smooth.
2. Add 1/2 cup butter, 1 cup sugar, and salt. Heat to lukewarm (about 110°F).
3. In a large bowl, combine yeast, water, and remaining 2 tablespoons sugar. Let stand until foaming (about 10 minutes).
4. Add potato mixture, 8 cups flour, eggs, and vanilla. Beat until smooth.
5. Gradually stir in additional 3 to 4 cups flour. Turn dough onto a heavily floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic (15 minutes). Add more flour if needed.
6. Let rise for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
7. Punch down, knead to remove bubbles. Divide the dough into equal portions.
8. Melt remaining butter. Roll each portion of dough into a 5x18 rectangle.
9. Brush with 3 tablespoons butter and sprinkle with half of the egg filling.
10. Roll up. Cut into 12 pieces, about 1 1/2 inches wide.
11. Place in a 9x13 inch pan, brush with butter, and let rise for 35-40 minutes.
12. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
